revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:ISBN missing]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 2501 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text: <!--{{ISBN missing}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Citing sources | text = ISBN missing | title = Please supply an ISBN for this book. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = [[Category:Pages with missing ISBNs]] | cat-date = <!--Category:Articles with broken citations--> }}<!--{{ISBN missing}} end--><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here --> </noinclude>

<!--{{ISBN missing}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Citing sources | text = ISBN missing | title = Please supply an ISBN for this book. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = [[Category:Pages with missing ISBNs]] | cat-date = <!--Category:Articles with broken citations--> }}<!--{{ISBN missing}} end--><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <!--{{ISBN missing}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Citing sources | text = ISBN missing | title = Please supply an ISBN for this book. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = [[Category:Pages with missing ISBNs]] | cat-date = <!--Category:Articles with broken citations--> }}<!--{{ISBN missing}} end--><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here --> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Citing sources | text = ISBN missing | title = Please supply an ISBN for this book. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Pages with missing ISBNs]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
